title: Monday code GA launch
excerpt: Our monday code abilities provides a secure, serverless environment within the monday.com platform. This is where you can host and run apps with monday.com’s security and compliance standards built in, avoiding the heavy…

posts.author: TomFri (Tom Fridman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our monday code abilities provides a secure, serverless environment within the monday.com platform. This is where you can host and run apps with monday.com’s security and compliance standards built in, avoiding the heavy lifting of setting up and managing production servers, and creating apps that meet our customers’ unique requirements.

Many of you have started using monday code recently, which allows us to learn, fix problems, and add new capabilities.

We are GA-releasing monday code with the latest optimization capabilities. With the improvement and with over than 50 apps in production, we feel confident to say: monday code is a performance multiplier solution for you.

What’s new?

  1. Support for additional programming languages for enhanced flexibility.
  2. Observation capabilities to boost app performance and address potential issues effectively.
  3. Allow managing subscriptions quota.
  4. A revamped Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) process, allowing you to build, deploy, and run full applications with multiple features—all within a single code base.
  5. Improved local development with a direct connection between the local environment and monday.com.
  6. Deployment directly from your developers’ continuous deployment (CD) environments using Github actions, streamlining the process and saving you time.

Join us on monday code, explore these exciting enhancements, and let’s create amazing apps together! Don’t forget to check out the video for more details.

posts.author: Lior_Marketplace (Lior Reiner)
posts.cookedHtml: So many users are about to benefit from mondayCode, as data storage is a huge barrier for larger accounts. Amazing opportunity!

posts.author: gregra (Greg Rashkevitch)
posts.cookedHtml: This is a true game changer for how developers are going to build apps. Reach out to me if you’re considering to host your next app on monday code but have concerns / questions, feel free to reach out
